hero.headline: Every wall tells a story — we make it *beautiful*
hero.subheadline: From tired investment properties to fresh new homes, we bring the colors you've been dreaming about to life in Macon.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Interior & Exterior Painting Done Right
services_section.subheading: Whether it's one room or the whole house, we handle every detail with precision

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Living rooms, kitchens, bedrooms — we transform your indoor spaces with multiple colors and flawless finishes that make each room shine.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Protect and beautify your home's exterior with quality paint that stands up to Georgia weather while boosting curb appeal.

services.title: Investment Property Painting
services.description: Fast, professional paint jobs for rental properties and flips. We understand timelines and budgets matter for your business.

services.title: Complete Home Remodeling Paint
services.description: Full interior and exterior painting as part of your renovation project. Coordinated colors and expert application throughout.

about.heading: Albert and His Team Know Paint
about.body: Led by Albert, our crew has been making Macon homes beautiful with professional interior and exterior painting. We show up on time, work hard, and stay focused on your needs until the job is done perfectly. From investment properties to family homes, we treat every project with the same attention to detail.

reviews.name: Carolyn B.
reviews.text: Frayal Painting did an incredible job on our investment property! The customer service was outstanding and the work was excellent.

reviews.name: Ahhleeka
reviews.text: My home desperately needed paint when I bought it. Got a quick text response and next-day estimate. Very timely and professional with my three different room colors.

reviews.name: Douglas D.
reviews.text: They painted our house beautifully. Very prompt, hard workers, and always attentive to what we needed. Really pleased with the results.

reviews.name: Maximo G.
reviews.text: Hired them for exterior and interior work — perfect job and great price. Very happy with Albert and his team's results.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Central Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Professional painting services throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to Transform Your Space?
cta.body: Get your free estimate today. We respond quickly and show up when we say we will.
